emails.subject: LOI - RedMeteor
emails.body: LOI RedMeteor Attached is my proposed form of NDA. I set up the choice in products similar to they way we did it in Prebon. Take a look and let me know if it meets with your approval.

emails.subject: LOI - RedMeteor
emails.body: LOI RedMeteor Attached is my proposed form of NDA. I set up the choice in products similar to they way we did it in Prebon. Take a look and let me know if it meets with your approval.

emails.subject: Re: LOI - RedMeteor
emails.body: Re: LOI RedMeteor Tana, RedMeteor verbally told me that they no longer have the dot com extension on their name. Other than that this LOI seems fine and is acceptable to send to the customer. Thanks again, -Dan
